parents.subject: LU-14356 utils: change position of the -lext2fs option

commit.subject: LU-13839 tests: run DNE/ZFS testing with RHEL7.9
commit.message:
LU-13839 tests: run DNE/ZFS testing with RHEL7.9

We are seeing multiple test suites crash with OOM in
DNE/ZFS testing with RHEL 8.3.  Let's see if we see the
same crashes running the same tests with RHEL7.9.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: fstype=zfs mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 clientdistro=el7.9 serverdistro=el7.9 testgroup=full
Test-Parameters: fstype=zfs mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 clientdistro=el8.3 serverdistro=el8.3 testgroup=full
Signed-off-by: James Nunez <jnunez@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I4e947e4d3989aa752be2f65ab16eda7637abec55
